name: DeepStack (Imperial College)
why: 3D memory / 3D-stacked DRAM LLM serving DSE; source memo flags vLLM cross-validation and 12% error as a comparison threat.
differentiation: Known-device precise exploration; our intended lane is unknown-device / moving-axis discovery instrument.

name: Minsoo Rhu (KAIST) line — Beyond the Memory Wall / MC-DLA
why: Memory-centric architecture and workload characterization line; close Korean/architecture context and likely reviewer-adjacent work.
differentiation: They propose architectures; our intended lane is an instrument for discovering/test-driving architecture axes.

name: MemOS
why: Memory-as-first-class execution paradigm and scaling-law pressure framing.
differentiation: Paradigm claim/reference point; our lane is executable evidence and control-plane projections.

name: Memory-Centric Computing (Mutlu)
why: Broad memory-centric computing survey/positioning around processor-centric bottlenecks.
differentiation: Foundational framing; our lane is AI-workload DSE instrument and memory-device projection.

name: SECDA-DSE
why: LLM-in-the-loop DSE / solver-style exploration reference from source memo.
differentiation: Solver for fixed/defined design spaces; our lane is moving-axis instrument and evidence ledger.

name: ACM TODAES memory-centric HW/SW co-design
why: Memory-centric HW/SW co-design reference from source memo.
differentiation: Use as context for co-design framing and boundary setting.

name: CIM survey (Memory Is All You Need)
why: Compute-in-memory survey and memory-centric claim surface from source memo.
differentiation: Survey/context; our lane is trace-backed DSE and device-spec projection.
